title: [App] Flamingo - Unpairing the charge case from headset
scenario: Unpairing the charge case from a Poly Voyager Legend 50 headset results in the device reconnecting as a standalone headset without the charge case
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen.
Tap on the Poly Voyager Legend 50 headset to open Device Settings.
In Device Settings, scroll to and tap 'Reset Device'.
Tap 'Clear' next to 'Clear Trusted Device List'. (Note: The app shows the device as disconnected at this point.)
Remove the device from the Poly Studio Mobile app (e.g., tap Remove Device or similar option).
Go to phone Bluetooth settings and unpair/forget the Poly Voyager Legend 50.
Reconnect the headset to the app by putting the headset in pairing mode and selecting it in the app.
expected: The headset connects properly and is displayed as a standalone headset only, without the charge case.
